name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: this morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
This is concerning. | Friend --

It seems the Sanders campaign is finally seeing the writing on the wall: Hillary has won more votes AND more pledged delegates in this election -- her lead in both is nearly insurmountable.

So this morning, Bernie’s campaign manager claimed the convention could be an “open convention,” and declared they’re going to try and flip delegates’ votes, overturning the will of the voters.

Your vote is your voice, and the Sanders campaign shouldn’t be trying to circumvent the process -- or the nearly 9 million (and counting) people who have made their voice heard for Hillary in this election.

We need to head into our next contests stronger than ever so that we can widen our delegate lead, widen our vote lead, and secure this nomination long before we get to the convention -- **can you chip in to help Hillary win key states like New York and Pennsylvania? When you do, we’ll send you a free sticker to say thank you!**
[ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUxNjE2MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNzk0NjE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUxNjE2MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNzk0NjE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

**Not able to make a donation, but want to stay connected to the campaign? Sign up for SMS updates:**

| [ | [**Sign up**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjUxNjE2MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNzk0NjE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjUxNjE2MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNzk0NjE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

***Message & data rates apply; text HELP for help & STOP to cancel.**

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors.
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjUxNjE2MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNzk0NjE1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjUxNjE2MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNzk0NjE1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjUxNjE2MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNzk0NjE1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUxNjE2MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNzk0NjE1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUxNjE2MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNzk0NjE1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjUxNjE2MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNzk0NjE1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjUxNjE2MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNzk0NjE1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUxNjE2MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNzk0NjE1S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjUxNjE2MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNzk0NjE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUxNjE2MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNzk0NjE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: WE JUST WON WISCONSIN!
body:
# Another overwhelming victory for our campaign in Wisconsin!
Sisters and Brothers - Moments ago the news networks called another state for our political revolution, and it's a big one: Wisconsin.
The corporate media and political establishment keep counting us out, but we keep winning states and doing so by large margins. If we can keep this up, we're going to shock them all and win this nomination.
[**Contribute $3 to our campaign tonight and we are going to keep winning states by large margins until we win this nomination and take our country back from the billionaire class.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-won-wisconsin?refcode=em160405 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-won-wisconsin?refcode=em160405")
Wyoming caucuses in just four days and New York votes two weeks from today, and you can bet the financial elite of this country won't give up without a fight. **They 're going to throw everything they can at us. But if we stand together, we're going to keep winning.**
Tonight kicked off the most important three week stretch of the campaign, and we did it with another overwhelming victory. If we can keep our momentum going through the states that vote and caucus over the next three weeks, we're going to win this election.
[**We're doing so well because you keep standing with our campaign. Make a $3 contribution now and help us win Wyoming on Saturday and New York on April 19.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-won-wisconsin?refcode=em160405 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-won-wisconsin?refcode=em160405")
Amazing win tonight. It wouldn't have happened without you. That's the absolute truth.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-won-wisconsin?refcode=em160405 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-won-wisconsin?refcode=em160405")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016

PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: One choice
body:
Nearly every poll shows that both Trump and Cruz will get crushed
by Hillary Clinton in the fall.

Peter, nearly every poll shows
that both Trump and Cruz will get crushed by Hillary Clinton in
the fall.

If we want to win the White
House, there is only one Republican candidate who can defeat
Hillary: Gov. John Kasich

It's mathematically impossible
for Ted Cruz to win enough delegates to secure the nomination.
His claims otherwise are dishonest and it's time for our Party to
unify behind the one candidate who can defeat Hillary.

Ted Cruz has spent millions of
dollars attacking Gov. Kasich's record, misleading voters. The
truth is, John Kasich has the conservative record that Ted Cruz
can only dream about. After all, he is another one-term Senator.

Ready to defeat Hillary? We'll
need your ongoing support as we head toward the April 19th New
York Primary and Pennsylvania, Maryland, Connecticut, Delaware
and Rhode Island on April 26th.

We're just 103 days away from the
convention!

>> CHIP IN $25 <<

>> CHIP IN $50 <<

>> CHIP IN $100 <<

Thanks for all that you're doing.

John Weaver
Chief Strategist
JohnKasich.com

From the Wall Street Journal:

"Mr. Kasich did the public
service of winning Ohio's delegates - with which Mr. Trump might
have locked up the nomination - and he deserves a chance to see
if he can win Pennsylvania or pick up delegates in the East and
California. He has no hope of reaching 1,237 delegates before the
convention, but what Messrs. Trump and Cruz really fear is that
the convention might want to nominate a potential winner." Read
more (here).

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: "Disqualify him, defeat him, unify the party later"
body:
#
You MUST see what CNN reported last night about the Clinton campaign's new strategy. It's crazy.
> "The Clinton campaign has been watching these Wisconsin results come in, and the delegate race of course is tight there, but the reality is they're running out of patience. **So they're going to begin deploying a new strategy, it 's going to be called disqualify him, defeat him and then they can unify the party later."**
**_Disqualify Bernie, defeat our movement, and pick up the pieces later._** That's their new strategy.
[**Contribute $3 to Bernie 2016 right now to help us get ready for the New York primary and be able to fend off whatever the billionaire class throws at us next.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-have-to-be-ready?refcode=em160406s1-v4-a "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-have-to-be-ready?refcode=em160406s1-v4-a")
We're bringing together millions of people in a political revolution that has won seven of the last eight contests. The political establishment hates what we're doing, and now it's clear the Clinton campaign is going to do everything in its power to stop us.
We can't let up now.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-have-to-be-ready?refcode=em160406s1-v4-a "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-have-to-be-ready?refcode=em160406s1-v4-a")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

name: Joe Sestak
subject: "Katie, I just wished you had kept it on a positive level."
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a63/3476a20e/c73d1d5/2745c59a/259075260/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, If you missed the debate last night, the coverage in today's _Philadelphia Inquirer_ is below. Too many, in order to try and win, will say almost anything (you can see it in the Republican presidential debate) which is why it was a disappointment to hear my opponent break the 8th Commandment last night. This race is not about me, but rather a principle: too many politicians are "shorting" Americans' trust, convinced they can earn it later, after they win... but they obviously haven't over the past years - and won't now. I don't want to just win, I want to govern, and a real leader cannot do that if you do not have the trust of the people. **[Please contribute to defend not only against falsehoods such as in last night's debate, but to continue our positive message of what I want to do for Americans, for us.](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a63/3476a20e/c73d1d5/2745c599/259075260/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0406FBp1")** | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a63/3476a20e/c73d1d5/2745c598/259075260/VEsF/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0406FBb1")

---
Warmly,
Joe

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Rick Scott EVISCERATES Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| [](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae233e/738133e4/35d8dbad/7f82399e/1764074463/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160331pm?refcode=pme160331pm_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")
---
Friends,

**Rick Scott signed a law last month that SLASHES funding for Planned Parenthood and family planning clinics.**

According to _New York Magazine_ , this law "_means women who need things like cancer screenings, pap smears, and birth control cannot seek it from providers like Planned Parenthood, which says it serves 67,000 women in Florida each year._ "

[_**Let Rick Scott know he 's NOT going to get away with this. Step up and stand with Florida women. Sign the petition >>**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae233e/738133e4/35d8dbad/7f82399f/1764074463/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160406m")

National Republicans aren't the only ones relentlessly attacking Planned Parenthood and women's access to health care. Ohio, Wisconsin, Texas, and now Florida have all passed laws to cut off access to reproductive care.

And then there's Donald Trump -- recently endorsed by Rick Scott -- who said that some women who get abortions should be "punished."

Republicans on the federal AND state level are attacking women's health. You know the difference? **State-level Republicans are winning.**

We need to take a stand. Women in Florida and across the country are counting on us to stop this wave and protect reproductive rights.

[_**I 'm fighting for women's access to health care. Stand with me. Click here and sign your name today.**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae233e/738133e4/35d8dbad/7f82399f/1764074463/VEsF/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160406m")

Thank you.

Patrick

| | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae233e/738133e4/35d8dbad/7f823998/1764074463/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

[Privacy Policy](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae233e/738133e4/35d8dbad/7f82399a/1764074463/VEsA/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/privacy")
clean_body: | "" Friends, Rick Scott signed a law last month that SLASHES funding for Planned Parenthood and family planning clinics. According to New York Magazine , this law "means women who need things like cancer screenings, pap smears, and birth control cannot seek it from providers like Planned Parenthood, which says it serves 67,000 women in Florida each year._ " "" National Republicans aren't the only ones relentlessly attacking Planned Parenthood and women's access to health care. Ohio, Wisconsin, Texas, and now Florida have all passed laws to cut off access to reproductive care. And then there's Donald Trump -- recently endorsed by Rick Scott -- who said that some women who get abortions should be "punished." Republicans on the federal AND state level are attacking women's health. You know the difference? State-level Republicans are winning. We need to take a stand. Women in Florida and across the country are counting on us to stop this wave and protect reproductive rights. "" Thank you. Patrick | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | ""

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: After Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
This will really help me out. | Friend --

I’m proud of the work our team did in Wisconsin. We faced an uphill climb there, but fought hard to stay in it -- thank you.

Now I’m looking forward to heading home to New York for the primary on the 19th. A victory in New York will take us one step closer to securing the nomination.

**Will you make a donation of $1 to make sure we’re strong heading into our next fights? We’ll send you a free sticker just to say thank you:**

Hillary

name: Katie McGinty
subject: two great updates (poll)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/8923651884451889152/7288817611666620416?refcode=e20160406.2&refcode2=e20160406.2nd&amount=25)
---
Dear Friend,

I wanted to share some great news from the past few days:

* A new _Harper_ poll out yesterday shows **we 've gained 14 points in the past five weeks** and are closing the gap on our primary opponent.

* **President Obama and Vice President Biden** endorsed our campaign to defeat Pat Toomey and take back the Senate for Democrats.

We're fast approaching Primary Day and momentum is on our side, but we're running out of time to close the fundraising gap.

**I need your urgent support today, friend, before tonight 's FEC filing deadline (the last reporting deadline ahead of our primary).**

**[I still need 18 people to chip in before midnight to help us hit our grassroots goal. Will you be one of them, friend? Click here to donate now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/8923651884451889152/7288817611666620416?refcode=e20160406.2&refcode2=e20160406.2nd&amount=25)**

I'm so proud of how far we've come over the past nine months, and now's the time when our hard work counts more than ever.

Thank you for being an important part of our historic, people-driven campaign,

Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8923651884451889152/7288817611666620416?refcode=e20160406.2&refcode2=e20160406.2nd&amount=25)

name: Anna Van Hollen
subject: 6th grade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Friend, Growing up, my parents taught me that elections are about the issues that matter to people. And, from a young age, I took this really seriously. | [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d65/70cdc2ba/47d4b2ac/396961d/118565386/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhapril?refcode=em040416&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em040516&source=em040516")
---
When my dad ran for Congress for the first time, people would often ask me why they should vote for him. Looking back, I think they expected me to say "He's the best" or "He's really nice," and honestly, that answer probably would have been just fine. It was coming from a 6th grader, after all.

**But instead, a lot of unsuspecting people received a monologue about my dad 's work on issues that were important:** how he beat the NRA and passed Maryland's gun safety law, how he was responsible for one of the biggest increases in school funding in Maryland history, and how he banned drilling in the Chesapeake Bay.

A lot of people walked away knowing a lot about my dad's record. They also probably walked away thinking my parents should really get me a bike or something. (I had one.)

Fast-forward, and we are back in the middle of a close campaign, and I'm getting the question again. And every time I do, I am still as proud as I was then that I am able to answer it by telling people about the work that my dad has done on real issues that make a difference in people's lives.

**I 'm proud of his role in passing Obamacare and authoring the provision that now allows young people to stay on their parents' insurance until they are 26. **And of the budgets he authors that call for equal pay, affordable child care, and paid sick leave, as well as his plan to address income inequality - which I watched him work on for months, going through the tax code line by line looking for ways to make it more equitable.

And I'm proud that everywhere I go, I meet people who pull me aside to thank me for the help they received from my dad to get them through a difficult moment in their lives.

In the heat of the campaign, sometimes we forget what elections are all about. **[For the next 20 days, join me in spreading the word about a candidate who has never lost sight of why elections matter. And please consider pitching in what you can so we can reach the people who don't know him yet.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d65/70cdc2ba/47d4b2ac/396961a/118565386/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhapril?refcode=em040416&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+For+the+next+20+days+join+me+in+spreadin&utm_campaign=em040516&source=em040516")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Donate $15 instantly>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d65/70cdc2ba/47d4b2ac/396961b/118565386/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhapril?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em040416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Donate+15+instantly+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em040516&source=em040516")**
**[Donate $25 instantly>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d65/70cdc2ba/47d4b2ac/3969618/118565386/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhapril?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em040416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Donate+25+instantly+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em040516&source=em040516")**
**[Donate $50 instantly>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d65/70cdc2ba/47d4b2ac/3969619/118565386/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhapril?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em040416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Donate+50+instantly+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em040516&source=em040516")**
**[Donate $100 instantly>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d65/70cdc2ba/47d4b2ac/3969616/118565386/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhapril?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em040416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Donate+100+instantly+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em040516&source=em040516")**
**[Donate $250 instantly>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d65/70cdc2ba/47d4b2ac/3969617/118565386/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhapril?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em040416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=7+-+Donate+250+instantly+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em040516&source=em040516")**
**[Or, donate another amount](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d65/70cdc2ba/47d4b2ac/3969614/118565386/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhapril?refcode=em040416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em040516&source=em040516")**
Anna
****[DONATE](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d65/70cdc2ba/47d4b2ac/3969615/118565386/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhapril?refcode=em040416&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=9+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em040516&source=em040516")****
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d65/70cdc2ba/47d4b2ac/3969612/118565386/VEsHBQ/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=10+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em040516&source=em040516") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. body:

We're five hours away from our final FEC filing deadline before Primary Day, and our fundraising total from grassroots donors is still a bit short.

If you've been waiting for the best time to make your first donation: THIS IS IT! Rush $5 right now to ensure Katie wins her competitive primary this month. Every dollar counts.

Team Katie

name: Team Sestak
subject: "Poll: Sestak has increased support" - the Herald-Standard
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a7b/3476a20e/c707036/2745dbc0/4263550802/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, Despite the phony attacks of Joe's opponent in last night's debate (see email below), we maintain our double-digit momentum, as reported in the Uniontown _Herald-Standard_ today - please help us continue to beat the odds: | _Sestak ... is** popular with Democratic voters and his numbers are rising.**_ _**" Despite fierce opposition from Democratic leadership in the Senate, the entire Democratic establishment in the state, and a popular White House, Sestak is beating the odds," pollsters said.**_
---
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a7b/3476a20e/c707036/2745dbcf/4263550802/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0406FB2b1&amounts=5,10,15,20,40,100,250")
---
Joe is beating the odds, Peter, as he always has because of you - [will you join him again in rejecting the sham attacks against Joe (below) by chipping in $5, $10, $15 or $20 today?](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a7b/3476a20e/c707036/2745dbce/4263550802/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0406FB2p1&amounts=5,10,15,20,40,100,250")
\- Team Sestak
* * *
Peter,
If you missed the debate last night, the coverage in today's _Philadelphia Inquirer_ is below.
Too many, in order to try and win, will say almost anything (you can see it in the Republican presidential debate) which is why it was a disappointment to hear my opponent break the 8th Commandment last night.
This race is not about me, but rather a principle: too many politicians are "shorting" Americans' trust, convinced they can earn it later, after they win... but they obviously haven't over the past years - and won't now.
I don't want to just win, I want to govern, and a real leader cannot do that if you do not have the trust of the people. **[Please contribute to defend not only against falsehoods such as in last night's debate, but to continue our positive message of what I want to do for Americans, for us.](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a7b/3476a20e/c707036/2745dbcd/4263550802/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0406FB2p2")**
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a7b/3476a20e/c707036/2745dbcc/4263550802/VEsD/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0406FB2b2")
---
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a7b/3476a20e/c707036/2745dbcb/4263550802/VEsA/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0406FB2g1")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a7b/3476a20e/c707036/2745dbca/4263550802/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0406FB2b3")
---
Warmly,
Joe

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a7b/3476a20e/c707036/2745dbc9/4263550802/VEsO/ "https://www.facebook.com/joesestak")[
](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a7b/3476a20e/c707036/2745dbc8/4263550802/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=Footer")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a7b/3476a20e/c707036/2745dbf7/4263550802/VEsHBQ/ "http://joesestak.com/") |

P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

name: Bernie Sanders 2016
subject: Step 1. Disqualify Bernie
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Hillary Clinton herself just unleashed the first part of the new "disqualify him, defeat him and then they can unify the party later" strategy we told you about. Look at this new headline:
**Washington Post:_"Clinton questions whether Sanders is qualified to be president"_**
Polls in Wisconsin haven't even been closed for 24 hours, and we're already seeing the start of the Clinton campaign's full-on attack before the New York primary. **We knew they were getting nervous, but candidly, we didn't think they would go this negative so quickly.** We have to be ready for what comes next.
[**Contribute $3 to Bernie 2016 right now to help us get ready for the New York primary and be able to fend off whatever the billionaire class throws at us next.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/get-ready?refcode=em160406v1-a "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/get-ready?refcode=em160406v1-a")
New York is going to be an important state for the Democratic nomination. Bernie was born there, Hillary Clinton moved there, and 247 delegates are at stake on April 19.
We've won seven of the last eight contests, and voters clearly side with Bernie. So now the Clinton campaign is moving beyond a discussion of the issues to say Bernie isn't even qualified to be president.
Meanwhile, Bernie's going to keep talking about universal health care, fighting climate change, making our economy work for everyone, and taking on our corrupt campaign finance system. Voters seem to like it - and we're not going to let up now.
[**Contribute $3 now to help Bernie continue talking to New York voters and defend against the Clinton campaign's plans to disqualify and defeat our campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/get-ready?refcode=em160406v1-a "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/get-ready?refcode=em160406v1-a")
The next two weeks until the New York primary are going to be difficult, but if we stand together, we can win. Thanks for standing with Bernie.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/get-ready?refcode=em160406v1-a "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/get-ready?refcode=em160406v1-a")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
